div.head: The Chargé in France (Wilson) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 740. Your 304, August 10, 7 p.m. I have spoken with BargetonPaul Pierre Bargeton, Director of Political and Commercial Affairs in the French Foreign Office. who says that the report is “absolutely inexact”. He said that a few days ago the French Chargé d’Affaires in Washington had been instructed to inform the State Department of the proposed non-intervention pact; and that while the French Government would of course be pleased if the American Government should desire to adhere thereto it was not the intention of the French Government to “invite” such adherence.
